title: Implement TUI status, mesh, config, and diagnostics views
description: Why this exists: the TUI should be a useful field and development tool, not only a chat window. What needs to be done: implement node status, radio/link summary, BLE/IP connection info, mesh neighbor or route state, basic editable config fields, key/trust status display where safe, log subscription, raw diagnostics, and unsupported-feature messaging. Acceptance criteria: status/config/mesh/log screens use the shared model; sensitive key material is never printed accidentally; config writes require confirmation; unsupported firmware operations show actionable errors; tests cover render and command behavior.
